---
title: Vosges
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810119/vosges_q9o8mj.png
description: Vosges, vue sur les balades de raquettes
categories: ["urbansketch"]
date: 2026-01-18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810119/vosges_q9o8mj.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
